lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: Hey...who gave you permission to come in here! Get out, get out I say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, alright...keep your night cap on.

sections.title: Attempting to take his cup of tea

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: Hey! What do you think you're doing? Leave my tea alone!

sections.title: Attempting to use Telekinetic Grab on his tea

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: Hey! What do you think you're doing? Don't go casting that kind of spell anywhere near my tea! Leave my tea alone you telegrabbing fiend!

sections.title: After completion of Zogre Flesh Eaters

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: Oh, so you're back then, come to gloat have you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, I've just come to ask you a couple of questions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get rid of the undead ogres?

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: Haven't I already explained this to you once before?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Humour me!

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: Ok, similar spells have been cast before and the only way to deal with the resulting creatures is to cordon off the area and not go in there again. The undead creatures usually manifest some sort of disease so it's

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: best to attack them from a distance with a ranged weapon.

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: Normal missiles like arrows and darts do very little damage to them because they're designed to destroy internal organs. This is a waste of time with undead creatures like undead ogres.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, clearly so what should we use?

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: From my research it looks like a flat ended arrow was designed called a 'Brutal arrow'. This does large amounts of crushing damage to the creature.

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: You can make them by using larger arrows, I think some Ogre hunters make them. But instead of adding an arrow tip, you hammer a large nail into the end of the shaft.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get rid of the disease?

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: Haven't I already explained this disease thing to you once before?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just tell me again or else I'll turn you back into an ogre!

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: No...noo...please, I'll tell you.

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: My research shows that two jungle based herbs can be used, one is found near river tributaries and looks like a vine, the other is found in caves and grows on the wall.

lines.speaker: Sithik Ints
lines.text: It's quite well camouflaged so it's unlikely that you'll find it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We'll see about that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I have to go.
